PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\""))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "src/.*\.py$"; then cd "C:/Users/jamie/OneDrive/Documents/Jamie VS Code/Git/Zeros Requiem" && python -m pytest tests/quick_test.py --tb=short -q 2>&1 | tail -25; fi'
PostToolUse.description: Auto-run quick tests after editing src/ Python files

PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | python -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\""))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(risk_manager\.py|sbrs_original_parameters\.py)"; then echo "BLOCKED: This file is protected. Ask user for explicit approval before editing."; exit 1; fi'
PreToolUse.description: Block edits to sacred files (risk_manager.py, sbrs_original_parameters.py)
